Solana mainnet went live 6 years ago. Grateful to every team that's built with us, it's been quite a ride.

6⃣ years of operating validators, supporting the network and believing in the vision
5⃣ years of running one of the largest Solana node fleets on premium bare metal and delivering what our clients call the most reliable service on the market
4⃣ years of building and maintaining the Yellowstone suite
3⃣ years of optimising access to Solana history since genesis
2⃣ years of improving transaction delivery with stake-weighted QoS
1⃣ year of doubling down on streaming performance, making it even faster and more reliable

Solana is 6 years old today

It’s been 4 years for me here - through highs and lows

Couldn’t be happier with the direction we’re heading https://t.co/keYGcxkP2U

distorted-sol again. same token, same conviction, 46.86% this time.

posted about distorted before. the conviction to enter wasn't from a chart signal or a technical setup. i

t was from believing in the token. if you don't actually believe in the token you're LPing, token side isn't for you.

token side is essentially a bet that the token recovers. if you're wrong you get hit twice, from IL and from the price going lower. 

held for almost a full day. wasn't comfortable the entire time. there were moments where price moved against me and the screen was red. but as long as the narrative didn't change, i had no reason to close.

that's what token side comes down to. not the chart, not perfect timing. just how much conviction you have in the token you picked.

Weekly Update – @NOMADZxyz | Week 12 [2026]

1. TL;DR

1.1 Quick wins:
1. Launched data analytics on our admin panel and improved search speed across the platform
2. Shipped release #10 to @solanamobile dApp Store with AI agent integration
3. Onboarded @SolanaSensei community (1,000+ NFT holders)
4. Crossed 16.7K registered users and 19.7K followers on X
5. Went live with node on @monad testnet
6. Warmed up and sent first email campaign to 5K users

1.2 What's next:
1. Platform: Launch the Earth interface - events, side events, and discount codes
2. Mobile: Work on release #11 - Matrica integration + new badges
3. Nomadz 100: Cohort 1 continuation + Cohort 2 launch campaign

2. Highlights

2.1 Product - Platform
1. Improved search speed - faster results across stays, events, and nearby discovery.
2. Added new upcoming events for Q2 2026 and continued expanding the Earth interface.
3. Continued iterating on the referral dashboard based on user feedback.

2.2 Product - Mobile
1. Shipped release #10 to the Solana Mobile dApp Store: AI agent integration, new quests and badges.
2. Release #11 in early scoping: Matrica integration + new badges

2.3 Growth
1. Ran the @SolanaSensei community campaign.
2. Launched a new campaign with @perena giving away 3 @perenimals
3. Sent the first email campaign: 5,000 emails delivered.
4. Crossed 16,800+ registered users and 19,700+ followers on X.
5. Node live on @monad testnet - validator running.
6. Weekly updates provided to @DeltaV_xyz. Looking forward to results on @nitrodotacc application.

3. Lowlights

1. Email open rates from the first campaign are being analyzed - optimizing subject lines and timing for the next blast to the full 16.8K list.
2. Some onboarding friction identified during the @SolanaSensei community launch - resolved quickly, added Matrica Registration button.

4. Core Metrics

1. Total Users: 16,806 (↑ from 16,567 last week)
2. Active Users (week): 977 (↑ from 869 last week)
3. New Users (week): 250 (↑ from 202 last week)
4. DAU: ~139 on average (↑ from 124 last week)
5. Transactions on Solana (week): ~870 (↑ from 669 last week, consistent daily volume, ~125–155/day)
6. X Followers (@NOMADZxyz): 19,764+ (↑ from 19,642)

5. This Week's Focus

→ Launch booking v2 with improved filters, loading and AI agent
→ Polish and launch the earth interface - side events, discount codes, events calendar
→ Scale email campaign to full 16.7K registered users
→ Continue Nomadz 100 Cohort 1 + open applications for Cohort 2
→ Begin scoping release #11 for Solana Mobile
→ New partnership and launch campaign with @cherrydotfun

6. Asks

1. Know event organizers in crypto/Web3 who'd want discounted stays for their attendees?
2. Looking for content creators to join Cohort 2 of Nomadz 100 - apply or refer someone

7. Shoutouts

Big thanks to the @LipeSolana and Solana Sensei community for the warm welcome. And to everyone who opened, clicked, and replied to that first email - you made the launch worth it.

We keep building Nomadz for you!
Source: https://t.co/kw69WRCMnx

🚨 Citi, PwC, and Solana tested tokenizing trade finance instruments onchain.

In a recent proof-of-concept, a bill of exchange was represented as a token on Solana, enabling the full lifecycle—from issuance to settlement—to run digitally. The model allows suppliers to issue tokenized payment claims and sell them to banks, potentially reducing processes that normally take days to just minutes.

agent dlmm gua agak anu banget hari ini. oh ya kalo mau coba bisa dm ya.

dalam satu hari dia udah coba 3 strategi berbeda. mulai dari classic bid-ask, terus evolve sendiri ke spot -30, terus nyoba bid-ask 10 bins.

gua ga nyuruh dia ganti strategi, dia belajar sendiri dari top LPers di tiap token yang dia analisa.

hasilnya? semua posisi hijau.

cara kerjanya simple sebenernya. sebelum buka posisi dia pull data top LPers di pool itu, lihat strategi apa yang lagi berhasil di token tersebut, terus nyesuain setup-nya berdasarkan apa yang top performers lagi lakuin. bukan hardcode, bukan guess, tapi beneran belajar dari yang udah proven di pool itu.

yang bikin gua kaget adalah dia milih spot -30 sendiri di beberapa token tanpa gua jelasin kapan harus pakai itu. dia pickup pola itu langsung dari data top LPers yang emang lagi pakai setup yang sama.

ini masih eksperimen. tapi kalau agent ini terus evolve kaya gini, gua penasaran dia bakal sampe mana.

10 Things To Do in Dubai This March

The last two days were a reminder of something we all know, but rarely stop to think about. 

A virus, a stomach that wouldn't cooperate, and suddenly the whole world shrinks down to a bed and four walls. 

When you're stuck like that, even the simplest things - a walk outside, fresh air - start to feel like luxuries. Being unwell has a way of sharpening your appreciation for time and health in a way that nothing else quite does. 

So the moment I was back on my feet, I started looking at what's out there. And honestly, Dubai delivered. It turns out there's an extraordinary amount happening right now. Whether you've been cooped up like I was, or you've simply been putting things off, consider this your nudge to get out and make the most of it.

Limited-Time Attractions (booking required) and Events Happening Now

1. Dubai Miracle Garden. Free entry for UAE residents with Emirates ID until March 31. Over 150 million flowers in full bloom across one of the world's most spectacular floral displays.
2. Aquaventure World. Free tickets available daily online for both UAE residents and visitors (March 10–22). Maximum four tickets per booking, limited availability each day.
3. Lost World Aquarium at Atlantis. Free entry on the same dates as Aquaventure (March 10–22), with the same booking conditions. A rare chance to explore one of Dubai's most immersive underwater attractions at no cost.
4. Jungle Bay Waterpark. Free access to the waterpark and resort beach from March 13–31. Advance booking is mandatory.

5. House of Hype at Dubai Mall. 50 free tickets released daily on a first-come, first-served basis until March 22. The only condition: wear the four colours of the UAE flag.

6. Aura Skypool. 500 free tickets available throughout March using the code AURA500. At 200 metres above the Palm Jumeirah, this is arguably the best free view in the city.

7. Beach Canteen Festival. Running from March 19 to April 5, this free beachfront festival features live entertainment, food, and a relaxed seaside atmosphere.

8. Ramadan Fireworks and Night Markets. With Ramadan in full swing, free fireworks displays and open-air night markets are taking place across the city, offering a festive and atmospheric way to spend an evening.

9. Camel Hugging Therapy at the Camel Farm. A genuinely unique free experience running March 11–22. Unusual, memorable, and completely free.

10. Dubai Aquarium. The aquarium itself requires a ticket, but the massive tank is fully visible from inside Dubai Mall at no charge.

i sat red for 3 hours on this position and didn't touch it. that patience just paid $65, 12% clean on shape-sol.

price moved against my range, fees weren't covering IL yet, and every instinct is telling you to close and cut the loss.

that's the whole point of this strat. you pick the right token, you set a default range, and you trust the setup. the exit pump came, swept through my bins, and i closed clean.

this is becoming my go-to when i don't have enough time to stare at charts for quick plays. with multidays classic bid-ask i check my position maybe twice a day. no active monitoring, no stress, just letting the range do its job.

the tradeoff is you have to be comfortable sitting in red. not every multi-days position is going to be green from the moment you open it. if you can't handle seeing IL on screen for a few hours without touching the position, this strat isn't for you.

but if you can hold, the exit pump almost always comes on a well-selected token. and when it does, it's a clean exit with fees stacked from the entire hold period.

slowly getting more comfortable with this approach. the r/r just makes sense for the current market.

$RA launches in 4 days…

triplet-sol, 1 day 18 hours, $97 profit, 14% clean. this is what a multidays classic bid-ask looks like when you pick the right token and just let it sit.

the setup was simple. classic bid-ask, -42% range on 80 bins, single side sol. no overcomplicated strat, just a clean wide range deployed after the token already dumped around 30% from ath.

i never open a position at ath. ever.

opening at ath means you're the exit liquidity for everyone who bought earlier. waiting for the dump means you're entering when most people are panicking, and your range has real room to work both ways.

token selection for multi-days is different from quick plays. minimum 1M volume per 24 hours and mcap minimum 1M. anything below that and the token might just slowly bleed with no volume to generate fees.

chart quality matters too. i specifically avoid tokens that had a sudden vertical pump on day 1 of launch. those never survive multi-days. i want a token with a healthy chart, gradual price discovery, and volume that's been consistent, not a one-day wonder.

the classic -42% range means my position covers a lot of ground without needing to touch it. i set it and checked back occasionally, no active monitoring.

i still have 2 positions open on other pairs running the same approach. this march i'm leaning more into multi-days plays. the current market feels like a good spot for it. less noise, less fomo, just fees accumulating.

the r/r on multi-days right now is actually really clean if you pick the right token and be patient.

3 hari ini gua sibuk vibecoding agent buat jalan DLMM multihour di @MeteoraAG sendiri.

gua train dia pake data dari lpagent, biar dia bisa baca pola top LP di pool yang dia analisa. 

terus gua tambahin ilmu dan framework yang gua udah punya selama ini soal DLMM. kombinasi keduanya yang nentuin gimana dia buka dan tutup posisi.

hasilnya? dari 0.6 sol sekarang udah 1 sol dalam 3 hari tanpa gua pegang.

tapi ini bedanya agent sama bot. bot itu kaku. lu set rule, dia jalanin rule itu terus sampe lu ubah manual. agent beda. 

dia bisa belajar dari kesalahan otomatis, evolve seiring makin banyak posisi yang dia buka, dan gua suruh dia ngelog dan jurnaling setiap keputusan yang dia buat. jadi gua bisa trace kenapa dia masuk, kenapa dia keluar, dan apa yang dia pelajari dari hasilnya.

ini masih eksperimen. gua rela kehilangan modal ini kalau emang hasilnya ga bagus. untuk biaya API-nya sendiri kena sekitar 3$ per hari.

tertarik buat nyoba?
